{{Infobox character
| name = Sylvan
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = Soulsmith
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|A Sylvan is a type of natural spirit, similar to a [[Remnant]] but created through the accumulation of balanced [[vital aura]] rather than the death of a [[sacred artist]]. These beings only manifest in locations where different aspects of [[aura]] exist in perfect equilibrium; for example, Sylvan [[Riverseeds]] emerge from areas with a strong balance of [[life]] and [[water aura]], while [[Sylvan Dreamseeds]] are born under the influence of [[dream aura]]. A [[Sylvan Riverseed]] specifically appears as a tiny, finger-sized humanoid composed of flowing blue waves that resemble water but are actually [[madra]] imitating a liquid state. These spirits are characterized by their gentle and flexible nature, possessing the ability to support and supplement various types of power. Because of this versatility, they are considered suitable for working with almost any aspect of energy. In practice, the [[Sylvan Riverseed]] exhibits curious and active behavior, communicating through various sounds such as peeps, chirps, whistles, or tones reminiscent of flutes and wind chimes. They can be nourished with [[madra]] to increase their color, solidity, and physical size. While they are capable of interacting with others through gestures like waving or slapping, they can also express complex emotions such as worry or frustration.}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Sylvan]] has a translucent blue form and flowing [[madra]] in her lower half.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c16">''Soulsmith'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Sylvan]]'s [[madra]] makes her look like she is wearing a dress.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c16" />}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Sylvan]] is a spirit that has only ever interacted with [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c14">''Blackflame'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Sylvans can smell an unwelcome guest.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|A [[Sylvan]] is a tiny spirit.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c19">''Blackflame'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Dross]] absorbed the [[Sylvan]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c15">''Ghostwater'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
